---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help improve LangKeep
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start LangKeep
2. Switch focus to '...'
3. Change keyboard layout to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain the problem.

Log location: `%AppData%\LangKeep\`

## Environment

- **Windows version**: [e.g., Windows 11 23H2, Windows 10 22H2]
- **LangKeep version**: [e.g., v0.1.0, or commit hash if building from source]
- **.NET version** (if building from source): `dotnet --version`
- **Installed keyboard layouts**: [e.g., en-US, de-DE, bg-BG]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
